calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Oct-16-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):

Natasha Oden, Esq., for Ronald Creswell, Petitioner.

At the court's query, counsel confirms that she is submitting on the papers. The court summarizes the series of events that led to the filing of the instant petition specifically, but not limited to, in 2006 the decedent took the subject property, which had been transferred into the trust, out of the trust to refinance the property and did not place the subject property back in to the trust.

At the conclusion of discussion, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Lopez. Not Reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Oct-01-2024 Continued To Oct-16-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
